overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge at night. The player navigates through a harbor channel using radar and GPS displays, approaching industrial dock structures with cargo cranes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor approach channel at night

events.description: slight course correction to starboard visible on radar display as vessel aligns with channel markers

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems and steering through the open harbor channel using radar guidance

entered.detail: digital chart display showing harbor map with vessel position and route
circular radar display showing channel boundaries and navigation markers
depth sounder display showing water depth profile
forward deck of the vessel visible through the bridge windows with railings and deck lights
dark water with reflections of navigation lights
faint lights from shoreline buildings on the horizon
industrial cargo cranes silhouetted against the night sky at the distant dock

segments.scene_description: The vessel moves steadily through open water on a clear night, viewed from the ship's bridge. Three navigation displays provide GPS, radar, and depth information while the bow cuts through dark waters. Distant city lights twinkle on the horizon and industrial harbor cranes are barely visible far to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock area with cargo loading infrastructure

events.description: vessel enters the industrial dock area with large cargo cranes becoming visible on the starboard side
dock structure and cranes now dominate the right side of the view as vessel approaches berth

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the narrow harbor channel while monitoring proximity to dock structures on the starboard side

entered.detail: concrete pier with mooring bollards and industrial lighting along the starboard side

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its approach into the industrial harbor, passing closer to the dock infrastructure. Large cargo cranes loom on the right side, transitioning from distant silhouettes to prominent structures. The radar display shows the vessel navigating through the marked channel as concrete dock walls become clearly visible along the starboard side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the open sea into the heart of a dark industrial harbor. It begins on the ship's bridge, where the bow cuts through dark waters under a clear night sky while navigation displays provide GPS, radar, and depth data. As the vessel advances, the distant twinkle of city lights and faint silhouettes of harbor cranes on the horizon gradually sharpen into prominent structures. The scene then shifts as the ship enters the marked channel, bringing the massive cargo cranes and concrete dock walls into clear view along the starboard side.
